# Current Family Transition Message Template

Hi [Name] — I’m moving lesson scheduling and payments into a new Heart of the Matter School of Music booking system so everything is easier in one place.

You’ll be able to choose your lesson/package, book from my availability, pay online, and receive automatic confirmations/reminders.

For current families, the transition is gradual:
- This month: your current rate stays the same.
- Next month onward: you move to the loyal family rate rather than the standard new-student rate.

Here’s the booking link:
[BOOKING LINK]

Thank you for being part of this next chapter.
